uiDefinition.description: Base URL of your DocRouter instance. Leave blank to use the default (https://app.docrouter.ai/fastapi).
Account-level API token (prefix acc_). Create under Settings → Developer in DocRouter. This is not an organization-scoped token (org_...). Sent as the X-Api-Key header.
uiDefinition.tooltip: Use an account-level token; organization tokens cannot call /v0/account/ APIs.
